ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock (e.g. AAPL for Apple Inc.) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry category of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date when the company went public */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* The number of employees in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the stock on that date */,
  "ad" REAL /* Accumulation/Distribution line value */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* The adjusted closing price after considering stock splits and dividends */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* The ratio of annual dividend payment per share to the stock's price per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the market index (e.g. S&P 500) */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Full name of the market index */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date for index calculation */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value for index calculation */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* The type of market index (e.g., price-weighted, market-capitalization-weighted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "index_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index price record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the index on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the index during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the index during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the index on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the index on that date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* The adjusted closing price after considering stock splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created in the system */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to (e.g., investment, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access activity */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* The parameters used in the query (e.g., date range, stock symbols) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the alert */,
  "threshold_price" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the alert should be triggered (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock associated with the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted future price of the stock */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Model used to generate the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* The confidence level of the prediction model */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* The upper bound of the predicted price range */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* The lower bound of the predicted price range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* The status of the notification (e.g., pending, sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend is deducted from the stock price */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* The amount of the dividend payment per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
